rationale: The citing paper references Hoban and Bucklin (2015) only as an example in literature-review style claims, such as PSA-based designs using very small control groups and charity-style placebo ads. The citation appears in grouped/background contexts and is not used to develop the ghost ads methodology, derive hypotheses, or interpret core empirical results. There is no distinct engagement with that paper's purchase-funnel framework or findings in the citing paper's main argument.
